textByHashes.a893b0826790ecd190e96afc2945279d69d73287: Three stories... Multiple entries... Numerous butlers...
textByHashes.6600f624caa3194ae1b134c34ee8c1f81d0c12f1: I'm here on business. I'd suggest you not worry about it. My line of work can be rather... cutthroat.
textByHashes.b599f590c1c0e673f7a34241d63352921cf97430: Then it seems I now have a gap in my schedule...
textByHashes.32d48d681e22c00681006e2541a4a63cf885bba8: I'm just watching and observing. I find that doing so offers plenty of... opportunities.
textByHashes.9b246a859ced008a0ecd357af6b375b4e877deea: I'm just enjoying the view. I find a place like this good when you want to... elimitate distractions.
